summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People Operations professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing processes grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve the employee experience—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.
